label: How it works
title: Your creative process,
subtitle: Content Intelligence doesn't tell you what to create. It shows you how to get more from what you already have, discover your creative patterns, and open possibilities you hadn't seen.

convert.title: Turn your idea into content
convert.body: Choose, define for whom. Get a brief.

grow.title: The platform grows with you
grow.body1: The more you create, the better it knows you.
